name: Chocolate Banana Custard
recipeIngredient: 2 cartons low-fat toffee-flavored yogurt, 125 g each
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the chocolate milk and custard powder in a bowl until well combined.
2. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
3. Once cooled, pour over sliced bananas.
4. Stir in the yogurt.
5. Refrigerate until ready to serve. Serves 6 or more.
